roleToggle.lockedHint: Go to Profile > Upgrade to switch role

about.metaDescription: Usha is the company behind Usha Platform — the platform for human expression. Get to know the vision and where we're headed.
about.title: About us
about.lead: Usha is the company behind Usha Platform — the platform for human expression.
about.p1: We believe the best moments happen when people meet for real — in movement, in play, and in creating together. Usha Platform brings creators, experiences and participants together in one place, where passion meets professionalism and every booking feels safe. All creators are BankID-verified and all payments are handled securely, so you can focus on what actually matters: the experience.
about.p2: Usha was founded by Pablo Acosta, who works at the intersection of dance, technology and community-building. The vision is simple: to build a place where creativity can thrive, talent can be seen, and people can come closer together.
about.p3: We're building step by step, with real experiences from day one. This summer we start with The Kiz Lab — open dance training every week in Stockholm. From there we grow into recurring monthly parties and, further ahead, an annual festival that brings the whole community together.
about.closing: This is just the beginning. Welcome to join us from the start.

account.deleteAccountDesc: Anonymize your profile and close the account
account.gdprInfo: When you delete your account, your profile is anonymized and permanently hidden, your listings are unpublished, and you are blocked from logging in. Your BankID and email link is released so you can register again from scratch. This action cannot be undone.

account.retentionNote: Payment and accounting records are retained for as long as the law requires.

help.title: Help & Support
help.q1: How do I book a service?
help.a1: Go to Marketplace, find a creator and click 'Book'. Choose a date and time, and send your request.
help.q2: How do I upgrade to Gold or Premium?
help.a2: Go to Profile > Payment methods and choose the plan that suits you.
help.q3: How do I get my payouts?
help.a3: Connect your Stripe account in Dashboard > Settings. Payouts are processed automatically every week, or instantly via quick payout.
help.a4: Yes, you can cancel under My Bookings as long as the booking is not already completed.
help.a5: Gold and Premium members get access to certain events before everyone else. When the countdown ends, the event becomes available to all.

install.title: Install Usha Platform
install.description: Usha Platform works as an app right from your browser. Install it for quick access:
install.chromeEdgeInstructions: Click the install icon in the address bar → "Install"
install.iosHelp: iPhone (Safari): tap the Share icon → "Add to Home Screen".
install.otherHelp: Open your browser menu (⋮) → "Install app" / "Add to Home screen".

hero.description: Usha Platform is the cycle that keeps Sweden’s creative life spinning – creators find work, venues fill their calendars, and audiences discover experiences to remember. Safe with BankID and Stripe.

ecosystem.title: Three pillars, one
ecosystem.subtitle: BankID-verified creators build the supply. Experiences offer the venues. Customers discover and book with confidence. Everyone amplifies each other.
ecosystem.loopMessage: More creators attract more customers. More customers attract more experiences. The cycle that drives growth.

creators.desc: Dance instructors, photographers, musicians, designers — creative talents building their business.
creators.detail2: Publish services, courses & events; manage bookings

onboarding.step1Desc: Sign up for free in seconds with Google, Facebook or email.
onboarding.step2Desc: Add bio, portfolio, services or events. Be visible instantly on the marketplace.
onboarding.step3Desc: Customers find you, book and pay. You focus on what you do best.

trust.title: Book with
trust.subtitle: We take security seriously. Everyone offering services and experiences on Usha Platform is identity-verified with Swedish BankID.

bankid.title: BankID-verified creators
bankid.desc: All creators and experiences verify their identity with Mobile BankID before creating an account. You always know who you're booking.

payment.title: Secure payment
payment.desc: All transactions are handled by Stripe — your card info is never shared with creators or experiences.

booking.title: Protected bookings
booking.desc: Every booking is confirmed digitally with a QR code. No fake tickets, no misunderstandings.

crew.title: Safe teamwork
crew.desc: Invite your crew, delegate ticket scanning to trusted people, and pay fees securely via Stripe — you stay in full control.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: A complete solution — create events, spread them on social media, sell and scan tickets, and track all attendees. All in one app.

faq.title: Questions &
faq.a1: Free during beta. On sold tickets we take a commission: 15% on the free plan, 8% on Gold and 3% on Premium. You always see your share before publishing.
faq.a2: Hosts and creators verify with BankID — it keeps everyone safe. Attendees can usually buy a ticket without verifying.
faq.a3: Ticket revenue flows via Stripe straight to your account. You can cash out fast — the first instant payout each month is free.
faq.q4: Can guests buy without an account?
faq.a4: Yes. Guests can buy a ticket with just an email and get a QR code to show at the door — no account needed.
faq.q5: Can I get help from others?
faq.a5: Yes. Invite your crew (creators, taxi dancers, volunteers, co-hosts), delegate ticket scanning, and agree on a fee you pay right in the app.

cta.title: Ready to try?
cta.description: Create an account in seconds and explore the entire platform at no cost.

onboarding.title: What are you looking for?
onboarding.subtitle: Three quick questions so we can match you well. Change anytime.

meta.title: For creators – Usha Platform
meta.description: More work without the sales grind. BankID verification boosts your credibility, and the tools to run your events live here – safe with Stripe.

hero.h1: More work – without the sales grind
hero.sub: A new income channel without chasing clients. Your BankID verification builds trust, and everything you need to run your events is in one place.

loop.title: How the cycle works for you
loop.body: More venues on Usha Platform means more stages for you. And more visitors means more bookings – without chasing anyone.

meta.title: For venues – Usha Platform
meta.description: A living programme without becoming a booker. Fill your calendar with curated, BankID-verified creators – no booking admin of your own.

hero.h1: A living programme – without becoming a booker
hero.sub: Fill your calendar with curated, BankID-verified creators. No booking admin, no risk – you stay in control.

loop.title: How the cycle works for you
loop.body: More creators means more to fill your stage with. And more visitors discover your venue through the experiences you offer.

values.twoDesc: We handle requests and payments – you skip the legwork.
values.threeDesc: Say yes to what fits your venue. No obligations.

eventForm.recurringHint: Creates {count} occurrences from the start date, same time each time. Each occurrence becomes its own bookable page.
eventForm.fbAutoPostHintRecurring: Each occurrence is automatically published to your connected Facebook page ~3 days before its date — a steady stream of reminders instead of all at once.
eventForm.fbAutoPostHint: The event is automatically published to your connected Facebook page ~3 days before the date. Requires a connected Facebook page.
eventForm.openToInstructorsHint: Let paying instructors offer paid mini-sessions (15–60 min) at your event. Participants buy minutes directly from the instructor. You take no cut of their revenue.

eventForm.serviceFeeAbsorbHint: The fee is deducted from your payout – the buyer pays only the ticket price.
eventForm.ticketTypesOverridePrice: The base price is replaced by the ticket types below.

eventForm.automationHelp: Times are in Swedish time. Leave blank to disable. The pre-sale price applies between start and end; after the end the event automatically becomes sold out until the public release.
eventForm.unlistedHelp: Hide the event from the marketplace and search — it can only be found via the direct link you share. Perfect for pre-sale to a waitlist.
eventForm.contentLanguageHelp: Forces the event page into this language for all visitors. Auto = follow the visitor’s language.

sellTickets.metaTitle: Sell tickets on Usha – lower fee than Tickster
sellTickets.metaDescription: Sell and deliver tickets to your events via Usha. 3% service fee (max 15 kr/ticket), QR tickets, check-in and payout via Stripe. Free events are always free.
sellTickets.ogDescription: Lower fee than Tickster. 3% (max 15 kr/ticket), QR tickets and payout via Stripe.
sellTickets.heroBody: Create your event, share the link and deliver QR tickets automatically. Just 3% service fee (max 15 kr per ticket), no fixed costs – and you decide whether the buyer or you cover the fee.
sellTickets.f1Body: Set a price or make the event free. Early bird, discount codes and access codes included.
sellTickets.f2Body: Multiple price tiers per event – e.g. Standard, VIP and Student, each with its own capacity.
sellTickets.f3Title: Multi-buy with a QR per guest
sellTickets.f3Body: Buy several tickets in one order – each guest gets their own scannable QR and can be named.
sellTickets.f4Body: The buyer gets their QR ticket by email and on a page – no login required. Scan at the door.
sellTickets.f5Body: Sold out? When a cancellation frees a seat, the next person in line is emailed automatically.
sellTickets.f6Body: The money goes straight to your Stripe account, with per-event settlement and CSV export.
sellTickets.pricingSub: min 3 kr · max 15 kr per ticket · free events = 0 kr
sellTickets.bullet2: You choose: the buyer pays or you cover the fee
sellTickets.bullet3: Payout straight to your Stripe account
sellTickets.bullet4: QR tickets, check-in and stats included
sellTickets.compareNote: Tickster publishes no fixed price list; the figures are common industry estimates and may vary.
sellTickets.ctaTitle: Ready to sell your first ticket?
sellTickets.ctaBody: Create an account, post your event and share the link. We handle tickets, payment and check-in.

ticketPage.showAtEntrance: Show this QR code at the door.

settlement.heading: Settlement
settlement.footer: Payout goes to your connected Stripe account. Stripe deducts its processing fee directly at payout, so the paid-out amount may be slightly lower than the net above. Free tickets are not included.

scanPage.title: Scan tickets
scanPage.subtitle: Scan the QR code or enter the ticket code manually.
scanPage.gateMessage: Upgrade to Gold or Premium to scan tickets.
scanPage.allowCameraHint: Allow camera access to scan — or enter the ticket code below.
scanPage.manualHelpTitle: If the prompt doesn't appear — enable it manually:
scanPage.manualHelpIphone: iPhone, Safari: Settings → Apps → Safari → Camera → Allow. Or tap aA in the address bar → Website Settings → Camera.
scanPage.manualHelpAndroid: Android, Chrome: tap the lock/icon in the address bar → Permissions → Camera → Allow, then reload.
scanPage.manualHelpDenied: If it says "Permission denied" below, the camera is blocked for usha.se. Open Chrome → ⋮ → Settings → Site settings → usha.se → Clear & reset (or Camera → Allow), reopen the page and tap Allow.
scanPage.manualHelpInstalled: Installed app: controlled by the same Chrome setting above — the app has no separate camera toggle.
scanPage.errCouldNotStartCamera: Could not start the camera. Close other apps using the camera and try again, or enter the ticket code manually below.
scanPage.errNoQrInImage: No QR code found in the image. Take a closer/straighter photo, or enter the code manually.
scanPage.errCouldNotParseQr: The QR code could not be read. Try entering the code manually.
scanPage.errOnlyOwnEvents: You can only scan tickets for your own events.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: These terms of service (“Terms”) govern your use of the Usha Platform (the “Platform”) provided by Usha AB, based in Malmö, Sweden (“Usha Platform”, “we”, “us”). By creating an account or using the Platform you accept these Terms.
terms.s2Body: Usha Platform is a marketplace that connects creators, experience providers and customers. The Platform lets you publish services, book experiences and make payments. Usha Platform acts as an intermediary and is not a party to agreements between creators and customers.
terms.s3Body: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account. You are responsible for keeping your login details secure. All activity under your account is your responsibility. Usha Platform reserves the right to terminate accounts that breach these Terms.
terms.s4Body: Payments are handled through Stripe. By using the Platform you also accept Stripe’s terms of service. Usha Platform charges a commission on transactions according to the plan the creator subscribes to (Free: 15%, Gold: 8%, Premium: 3%).
terms.s5Body: Cancellations can be made by both customers and creators. Cancellation terms are set by the creator for each individual service. Usha Platform is not responsible for any disputes regarding cancellations.
terms.s6Body: All content you upload to the Platform remains your property. By publishing content on the Platform you grant Usha Platform a non-exclusive right to display and distribute the content within the scope of the service.
terms.s7Body: Usha Platform provides the Platform “as is” without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for indirect damages, lost profits or loss of data. Our total liability is limited to the amount you have paid to Usha Platform during the last 12 months.
terms.s8Body: Usha Platform reserves the right to change these Terms. Material changes are announced by email or via the Platform at least 30 days before they take effect. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated Terms.
terms.s9Body: These Terms are governed by Swedish law. Any disputes shall be resolved primarily through negotiation and secondarily by a general court, with Malmö District Court as the court of first instance.
terms.s10BodyPre: Questions about these Terms? Contact us at

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: Usha AB is the data controller for the processing of your personal data. We process your data in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Swedish law.
privacy.s2Items:
Account details: name, email address, profile picture
Payment details: handled by Stripe (we store no card details)
Booking history: dates, times, services you have booked
Communication: messages via the platform
Technical data: IP address, browser type, device information
privacy.s3Items:
Provide and improve our service
Manage bookings and payments
Send confirmations and notifications
Prevent fraud and abuse
Comply with legal obligations
privacy.s4Body: We process your data based on: performance of a contract (to deliver the service), legitimate interest (to improve the platform), consent (for marketing) and legal obligation (accounting).
privacy.s5Body: We share your data with: Stripe (payment processing), Supabase (data storage), Resend (email delivery). We never sell your personal data to third parties. Data may be shared with authorities if required by law.
privacy.s6Body: We keep your data for as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, your personal data is anonymised and hidden immediately: your profile is removed from all public areas, your login is blocked and the link to your email address and BankID is released so you can register again. Data we are legally required to keep (e.g. payment and accounting records for 7 years) is retained for the statutory period and then erased. This action cannot be undone.
privacy.s7Intro: Under the GDPR you have the right to:
privacy.s7Items:
Request access to your data
Request rectification of incorrect data
Request erasure (“the right to be forgotten”)
Restrict the processing of your data
Object to processing
Request data portability
Withdraw consent
privacy.s8Body: We take appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit and at rest, access control and regular security reviews.
privacy.s9BodyPre: For questions about how we handle your personal data, contact us at
privacy.s9BodyPost: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Swedish Authority for Privacy Protection (IMY).
